message:
🐛 Fix card height not applying — use inline style instead of dynamic Tailwind class (#945)

The card `min-h-[${h*100}px]` Tailwind class was dynamically constructed at
runtime, but Tailwind JIT only detects literal class strings in source code.
The CSS was never generated, so all cards rendered at auto height regardless
of their config `h` value.

Switch to inline `style={{ minHeight }}` which works with any dynamic value.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
